Hope, resilience, strength; unwavering, determined, inspiring.  
I tried to keep my head up despite the storm; I knew I had to keep moving forward.  
We're in this together, and we will overcome.  
It's always darkest before the dawn, and we'll rise from the ashes.  
Never give up, because even the smallest spark can ignite a flame.  
Remember, you are not alone in this fight.  
Together, we can make a difference.
